publications.title: Consultation Paper on Regulatory Framework for Digital Payment Token Services
publications.summary: MAS proposes enhanced AML/CFT requirements for digital payment token service providers, including stricter customer due diligence for cross-border transactions exceeding $5,000.

publications.title: Circular on Insurance Distribution Channel Requirements
publications.summary: Updated requirements for digital insurance distribution channels, effective 1 July 2026. Requires enhanced disclosure for bundled products sold through non-traditional channels.

publications.title: SEC Charges Three Firms for Unregistered Crypto Trading
publications.summary: SEC enforcement against three firms operating unregistered digital asset exchanges. Signals continued aggressive posture on crypto intermediaries.

publications.title: HKMA Guideline on AI in Customer-Facing Financial Services
publications.summary: New guidelines requiring explainability and human oversight for AI systems used in customer-facing financial services, including automated advisory and claims processing.

publications.title: FCA Policy Statement: Strengthening Financial Promotions Rules for High-Risk Investments
publications.summary: FCA finalises rules tightening marketing requirements for high-risk investment products including leveraged FX. Effective 1 September 2026.

urgent_actions: MAS DPT consultation paper — 30-day comment window, directly impacts digital payments and retail FX operations
MAS insurance circular — 1 July 2026 effective date, requires distribution channel compliance review
monitoring_items: HKMA AI guidelines — 60-day consultation, broad applicability across all business domains
FCA promotions rules — September 2026 deadline, review FX marketing materials
informational: SEC crypto enforcement — no direct action required, maintain watching brief on US regulatory posture
